src: We introduce 'Thinking with Video', a new paradigm leveraging video generation for multimodal reasoning. Our VideoThinkBench shows that Sora-2 surpasses GPT5 by 10% on eyeballing puzzles and reaches 69% accuracy on MMMU.
ja: 「Thinking with Video」を提案——動画生成をマルチモーダル推論に活用する新パラダイム。VideoThinkBenchでは、Sora-2がGPT5を目視パズルで10%上回り、MMMUで69%の精度を達成。
